403.description: SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED — no Premium subscription, or SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED — subscription lapsed

403.description: SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED — no Premium subscription, or SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED — subscription lapsed

post.description: Adds lemma to the New deck and auto-rebalances all decks. Requires Premium.

403.description: SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED — no Premium subscription, or SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED — subscription lapsed

delete.description: Removes lemma from all decks. Requires Premium.

403.description: SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED — no Premium subscription, or SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED — subscription lapsed

post.description: Submit review result for a card. 'know' updates movedAt (sends card to FIFO end), 'again' leaves card unchanged. Requires Premium.

403.description: SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED — no Premium subscription, or SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED — subscription lapsed

get.description: Returns N words from the user's dictionary not yet in any deck. N = dailyWordCount setting. Requires Premium.

200.description: List of dictionary entries ready to be added to the deck.

403.description: SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED — no Premium subscription, or SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED — subscription lapsed

get.summary: Get daily words to add to deck

get.description: Returns cards from New, Old, Retired and today's numbered deck (rotating daily). Requires Premium.

403.description: SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED — no Premium subscription, or SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED — subscription lapsed

get.description: Returns word count per deck and current settings. Requires Premium.

403.description: SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED — no Premium subscription, or SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED — subscription lapsed

post.summary: Create feedback thread with first message

patch.summary: Mark all admin messages in thread as read

get.description: Returns total phrase count, category count, and saved count for the current user.
Returns all categories with phrase count.
Returns phrases with optional filters by category, language, saved status, and search term.

200.description: List of phrases with words and examples

post.description: Submit a phrase suggestion from the current user.
Saves or unsaves a phrase for the current user.

200.description: Array of dictionary entries (JSON) or CSV string

get.summary: Export personal vocabulary as JSON or CSV
Export reading & word progress as JSON

200.description: Object with vocabulary, textProgress, wordProgress, reviewLogs

get.summary: Export full data archive (vocabulary + progress) as JSON

get.description: Returns full learning analytics for the /statistics page: header metrics, streak, year heatmap, word progress donut, words-per-day chart, texts progress list, review accuracy, and recent activity. Supports period filtering: week | month | year | all. Requires Premium.

200.description: { period, header, streak, heatmap, words, wordsPerDay, texts, accuracy, recentActivity }

info.title: MottLarbe API
info.description: API documentation for the MottLarbe platform. Version is selected via x-api-version header (default: 1).

bearer.name: Authorization
bearer.description: Provide your JWT access token prefixed with "Bearer"

quality.description: Quality of recall: 0-2 = failed, 3 = correct with difficulty, 4 = correct, 5 = perfect

tokenId.description: Token ID (UUID) of the word to look up
Token ID when adding from text click. If set, word/translation are resolved server-side.

word.description: Word (required if tokenId is not provided).

translation.description: Translation (required if tokenId is not provided).

folderId.description: Folder ID to put the entry into

cefrLevel.description: CEFR level of the word (A1, A2, B1, B2)

folderId.description: Move to folder. Pass null to remove from folder.

contentRich.description: TipTap/ProseMirror JSON document (type: 'doc', content: block nodes)

description.description: Short description / annotation of the text

tagIds.description: Array of tag UUIDs to assign to the text.

publish.description: If true, sets publishedAt to now on creation.

autoTokenize.description: If false, skips tokenization after creation. Default: true.

autoTokenizeOnSave.description: Auto-retokenize on every save when pages change. Stored on the text.

useNormalization.description: Bring words to base form during tokenization.

pages.description: Pages of the text (pageNumber + TipTap document per page)

ids.description: Array of text UUIDs to act on

useMorphAnalysis.description: Run full morphological analysis pipeline (dictionary, cache, online lookup)

description.description: Short description / annotation of the text

publishedAt.description: Publish: ISO date string. Unpublish: null. Omit to leave unchanged.

archivedAt.description: Archive: ISO date string. Un-archive: null. Omit to leave unchanged.

imageUrl.description: Cover image URL. Null to remove.

pages.description: Pages of the text (pageNumber + TipTap document per page). If sent, replaces all pages.

tagIds.description: Array of tag UUIDs to assign to the text. Replaces existing tags.

status.description: Convenience status field. Maps to publishedAt / archivedAt.

autoTokenizeOnSave.description: Auto-retokenize on save when pages change.

useNormalization.description: Bring words to base form during tokenization.

original.description: Original word as shown in text (e.g. fix typo)

vocabId.description: TextVocabulary id to link token to dictionary entry, or null to unlink

original.description: Original word as shown in text (e.g. fix typo)

vocabId.description: TextVocabulary id to link token to dictionary entry, or null to unlink

forms.description: Inflected forms (replaces all existing forms for this lemma)

ids.description: Array of lemma IDs to delete

text.description: Example sentence in the target language

ids.description: List of unknown word IDs to delete

headword.description: Headword (lemma form). If omitted, the unknown word's surface form is used.

lemmaId.description: Lemma ID to link the unknown word to (as a form)

ids.description: List of user IDs to apply action to

plan.description: Active subscription plan type. null means FREE (no active subscription).

tabs.description: Counts per tab for badge display (based on current search/role/plan filters)

isLifetime.description: Whether this is a lifetime subscription

textsCount.description: Number of texts with any progress for this level

textsRead.description: Total number of texts with any progress for this user

wordsKnown.description: Total number of words marked as KNOWN for this user

wordsLearning.description: Total number of words currently in LEARNING status for this user

dictionaryWordsCount.description: Total words saved to user's personal dictionary (UserDictionaryEntry count)

dictionaryFoldersCount.description: Total folders in user's personal dictionary

failLookupCount.description: Total FAIL_LOOKUP events: words the user tapped that were not found in the dictionary

streakDays.description: Current learning streak in days (consecutive days with activity)

totalStudyMinutes.description: Total study time in minutes, calculated from user activity events

roles.description: Assigned RBAC roles with assignment date

subscription.description: Current active subscription, null if none

learningStats.description: Aggregated learning statistics for this user

role.description: Role name to assign to the user

isEnabled.description: Override value for this specific user

code.description: Coupon code to apply to the user

tokenAnalysis.description: Грамматика и базовая форма слова (анализ токена)

wordContexts.description: Контексты слов — фрагменты текстов, где встречалось слово

interval.description: Billing interval (e.g. month/year). Null for lifetime/free.

isActive.description: Whether plan is active and visible

interval.description: Billing interval (e.g. month/year). Null for lifetime/free.

status.description: Subscription status. Defaults to ACTIVE unless trial/lifetime is used.

trialDays.description: Trial duration in days. If provided, status becomes TRIALING and endDate is set.

isLifetime.description: If true, creates a lifetime subscription (endDate = null, isLifetime = true).

provider.description: Payment provider (MANUAL by default for admin actions).

amountCents.description: Refund amount in cents. If omitted, will refund full remaining amount.

amount.description: Discount value (percent for PERCENT, cents for FIXED)

applicablePlans.description: Plan codes this coupon applies to ([] = all plans)

maxPerUser.description: Max redemptions per single user (null = unlimited)

newUsersOnly.description: Only new users (no prior paid subscription)

isStackable.description: Can be stacked with other coupons

amount.description: Discount value (percent for PERCENT, cents for FIXED)

applicablePlans.description: Plan codes this coupon applies to ([] = all plans)

maxPerUser.description: Max redemptions per single user (null = unlimited)

newUsersOnly.description: Only new users (no prior paid subscription)

isStackable.description: Can be stacked with other coupons

environments.description: Environments where this flag is active
Environments where this flag is active

key.description: New unique key for duplicated feature flag

isEnabled.description: Override flag state for this user

add.description: String to append to the stem to reconstruct the lemma (empty = stem as-is)

pos.description: Part of speech: NOUN, VERB, ADJ, ADV, PRON

isRegex.description: Whether suffix is a regex pattern

type.description: Rule type: NOUN_CASE | PLURAL | VERB_PAST | SUFFIX | ENDING | PREFIX | REGEX

priority.description: Higher priority rules are tried first

add.description: String to append to the stem to reconstruct the lemma

pos.description: Part of speech: NOUN, VERB, ADJ, ADV, PRON

assigneeAdminId.description: Admin user id to assign. Pass null to unassign.

scope.description: pending — только необработанные; errors — тексты с NOT_FOUND/AMBIGUOUS; all — полная переобработка всех

isEnabled.description: Enable or disable the deck learning method

dailyWordCount.description: How many words to suggest per day

deckMaxSize.description: Maximum number of cards per deck

result.description: Review result: 'know' — remembered, 'again' — did not remember
